data.broker_brief: Chomps is a premium meat snack brand with exceptional market positioning — #1 BSR on Amazon with 4.7/5 stars across 600+ reviews and distribution in major retailers including Whole Foods, Target, Walmart, and Costco. The brand has strong premium credentials with 7+ certifications (B Corp, Keto, Paleo, Whole30) and proven consumer loyalty with subscribe & save functionality. At $16.99+ SRP, they command premium pricing in the competitive protein snack category.

data.email_subject: Chomps expansion into your region — strong velocity data + regional gaps
data.email_body:
Hi [Buyer Name],

I wanted to bring Chomps to your attention for your protein snack set. As a brand with #1 Amazon BSR in meat snacks and distribution across Whole Foods, Target, Walmart, Costco, and Sprouts nationally, their regional velocity data suggests meaningful whitespace in your specific markets.

A few data points I think you'll find compelling:

• #1 Best Seller Rank in Meat Snacks on Amazon (4.7★, 600+ reviews)
• 7+ premium certifications: B Corp, USDA Organic, Keto, Whole30, Paleo
• SRP $16.99–$22.99 — strong margin profile for the category
• Subscribe & Save activated — proven consumer loyalty signal
• $500M revenue trajectory in 2024

Chomps' grass-fed, gluten-free positioning aligns perfectly with the Whole Foods customer. Their SKUs move particularly well in markets with strong outdoor/active lifestyle demographics.

I'd love to put together a regional velocity analysis and discuss which doors make the most sense to prioritize. Are you available for a 20-minute call this week?

Best,
[Your name]
Independent Food Broker | [Territory]
